description: cmd_1636 Phase B 試運転 (ash1): mvHqvnHOI7o 1本処理 (3並列安全確認)
steps: 0) advisor()呼出 1) 【3並列安全確認フェーズ】ash2+ash3と同時並列 — 事前メモリ確認: free -h && nvidia-smi 2) VIDEO_ID=mvHqvnHOI7o && mkdir -p /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki/work/cmd_1636_mvHqvnHOI7o/{input,output} 3) cd /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki && source ~/.bashrc && source venv/bin/activate && python3 scripts/downloader.py 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mvHqvnHOI7o' --output-dir work/cmd_1636_mvHqvnHOI7o/input/ 4) python3 scripts/vocal_stt_pipeline.py work/cmd_1636_mvHqvnHOI7o/input/mvHqvnHOI7o.mp4 --output /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki/work/srt_and_candidates/merged_mvHqvnHOI7o.json --work-dir work/cmd_1636_mvHqvnHOI7o/output/ --cache 5) 完了後: free -h && nvidia-smi で最終メモリ記録 6) A-F検証 & dmesg OOM確認 7) advisor()呼出 8) inbox karo 完了報告 (RAM/VRAM/処理時間/OOM有無)
notes: Phase A (2並列) が正常完了した場合のみ実行。異常(RAM>40GB/OOM)時は即STOP→inbox karo。GEMINI APIは期限切れのためscene_search_v2 build禁止。
